titles.title: I Know the Lord Will Make a Way for Me – V2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know the Lord will make a way for me. (4x) If I live a holy life, Shun the wrong and do the right, I know the Lord will make a way for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He died to save me from my sin and shame. (4x) Though my needs be great or small He has suffered for them all, He died to save me from my sin and shame.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Twill be a joy to hear Him say well done. (4x) If I trust and never doubt, Pay my tithes and sing and shout, 'Twill be a joy to hear Him say well done.
